description.value:
Prerequisite: To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Rat tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Rat, you gain +4 bonus to Hide checks (competence).
description.summary: Summon Rat tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Rats; +4 bonus to Hide checks (competence) within 50 ft of summon.
